about.main_text: Created in 2020 by web developer and graphic designer Filipi Hadji, meuLinux was born with the purpose of simplifying access to various Linux distros, allowing users to easily find the ideal option to meet their needs. With the help of smart filters and efficient tags, we make browsing and searching for Linux distros easy, clean, and simple.
about.quote: We simplify access to multiple Linux distros
about.curation_text: We constantly perform careful curation, highlighting the distros that stand out and suit each unique user profile.

about.footer_title: Are you ready for a truly free and customized computing experience?
about.footer_text: We believe in robust privacy, open source, and full control at your fingertips. Explore our website and discover a wide variety of choices. Developers, designers, photographers, video editors, students, and general users will find top stability, advanced tools, and a passionate global community ready to help.
